title: Security: Race Condition in amdgpu_ttm_tt_get_user_pages
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
I found that this uaf vulnerability does not exist in linux kernel 5.10, but this problem exists in chromeos kernel 5.10.  
  
When you mmap() the gem object, amdgpu_gem_object_mmap() records  
the pointers to the mm_struct and the VMA. When you unmap the VMA (or any
